name: dev-framework
description: AI-led development framework built on Managed Agents architecture. One command /dev with 7-phase full cycle, freeze-doc-enforced research/execution boundary, two user approval gates, and multi-agent consensus reviews. Session state lives in an append-only event log (events.jsonl) with derivable views, stateless restart (wake.sh), seq-level replay, and multi-brain fan-out. Phase metadata declared in YAML; narrative stays in SKILL.md. modelProfile config knob tunes iteration counts as model capabilities evolve.
